heroHeadline: Lavan Refinery Burns On as Israel Pounds Lebanon — Israeli Officials Call Trump's Ceasefire 'Defeat from the Jaws of Victory'
heroSubtitle: Hours after the US-Iran ceasefire took effect, Lavan Island's oil refinery continued to blaze, Israel escalated Lebanon bombardment, and Israeli officials voiced sharp internal criticism of Trump's deal — framing it as a strategic setback.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-08. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC, New York Times, Fox News, Military.com.
